sections.recommendation:
Adopt a Resolution approving appointments to City Council Policy Committees,
Partnership Committees and Regional Bodies, to temporarily appoint Mayor Adena Ishii
and Councilmembers Terry Taplin and Ben Bartlett to the Agenda & Rules Committee.
sections.background:
There are a number of City Council appointments to various Partnership Committees,
Regional Bodies and Liaisons to City Boards and Commissions. Every two years after
the General Municipal Election, the Mayor makes recommendations on new Council
representatives to these committees.
The Berkeley City Council Rules of Procedure and Order also require the Mayor to
recommend and the full Council approve appointments to Standing Council Policy
Committees by January 31st of each year.
With three members of the City Council leaving after the end of their term, the Agenda &
Rules Committee will lack quorum for its meeting on January 6, 2025. While this
Resolution continues to list outgoing Councilmembers in other Committees, there is not
any quorum issues related to those assignments and will be updated when the incoming
Council approves permanent changes for the new legislative session later in January.
FINANCIAL IMPLICATIONS
None
sections.environmental:
No identifiable environmental effects from taking this action.

RESOLUTION NO. ##,###-N.S.
APPROVING APPOINTMENTS TO STANDING CITY COUNCIL POLICY
COMMITTEES, PARTNERSHIP COMMITTEES, AND REGIONAL BODIES
WHEREAS, the City Council has numerous appointments to various Partnership
Committees, Regional Bodies and Liaisons to City Boards and Commissions, and makes
new appointments every two years following the General Municipal Election; and
WHEREAS, the Berkeley City Council Rules of Procedure and Order also require the
Mayor to recommend and the full Council approve appointments to Standing Council
Policy Committees by January 31st of each year; and
WHEREAS, with three members of the City Council leaving after the end of their term,
the Agenda & Rules Committee will lack quorum for its meeting on January 6, 2025,
requiring temporary appointments to be made before the incoming Council votes on
Committee appointments for 2025-2026.
NOW THEREFORE, BE IT RESOLVED by the Council of the City of Berkeley that it
officially makes the following appointments for the period ending December 31, 2024 or
until new appointments are approved:
City Council Standing Policy Committees:
Agenda & Rules Committee
Appoint Mayor Ishii, Councilmember Taplin and Councilmember Bartlett
Alternate position vacant
Budget & Finance Committee
Appoint Mayor Arreguín, Councilmember Hahn and Councilmember Kesarwani
Appoint Vice-Mayor Wengraf as Alternate
Facilities, Infrastructure, Transportation, Environment & Sustainability Committee
Appoint Councilmember Humbert, Councilmember Lunaparra and Councilmember
Taplin
Appoint Councilmember Kesarwani as Alternate
Public Safety Committee
Appoint Councilmember Bartlett, Councilmember Taplin and Councilmember Tregub
Appoint Councilmember Humbert as Alternate
Land Use, Housing & Economic Development Committee
Appoint Councilmember Humbert, Councilmember Lunaparra, and Vice-Mayor Wengraf
Appoint Councilmember Tregub as Alternate
